title: Domicile of board; meetings
doc_html:
§1354.  Domicile of board; meetings

The domicile of the board shall be in Baton Rouge; but meetings may be held at other places in the state.  Meetings shall be held on call of the chairman.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 281, §1.
